coverage_policy.pre_full_series_windows: windows starting before full_series_start require the reduced-coverage axis policy already modeled by quadrant_macro coverage/u_floor mechanics; such runs are labeled reduced_coverage and are supplementary, never primary evidence

out_of_sample.fold_rule: train and test windows are contiguous and non-overlapping within a fold; parameters frozen at train end; no lookahead into test
out_of_sample.acceptance: every fold must satisfy the selected profile thresholds in threshold_candidate_report.json; stability metric (max deviation from cross-fold median) must not exceed the profile stability bound

stress_windows.rationale: fastest equity drawdown on record; tests quadrant flip latency and defensive floor
simultaneous equity and duration drawdown; the core failure mode a growth/inflation quadrant model must navigate
credit stress with rates whipsaw; tests credit-sensitive axis inputs (BAML OAS series)
late-cycle tightening drawdown with fast recovery; tests whipsaw turnover
deepest modern drawdown; supplementary evidence under reduced-coverage axis policy
duration shock without growth shock; supplementary quadrant-classification test

stress_acceptance.note: decision_coverage below 1.0 in a full_series window is an automatic no_go for that window; window MDD and worst_5d_return are judged against the selected profile in threshold_candidate_report.json
